summary: iOS 👀 | 5200 | 4320 | DFU is NOT blocked during the call
scenario: DFU is not blocked during an active call; user can trigger DFU from Software Update screen while on a softphone call instead of seeing a popup message that it is unavailable.
description_clean: DFU is not blocked during an active call. When a user is on a softphone call (e.g., Zoom) and navigates to Device Settings > Software to tap Update, they are taken to the Software Update screen and can trigger DFU. Expected behavior: a popup message should inform the user that DFU is not available during a call.
steps: 1. Start or join a softphone call (e.g., Zoom).
2. While the call is active, navigate to Device Settings > Software.
5. Attempt to trigger DFU (Device Firmware Update).
expected: A popup message should inform the user that DFU is not available during a call.
actual: The user is taken to the Software Update screen and can trigger DFU without any popup or block.
